title: Generate R program to derive ADSL (Subject-Level (baseline focus))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADSL (Subject-Level (baseline focus)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: HEIGHTBL, WEIGHTBL, BMIBL, MMSETOT, AGEGR1, (3) Handle baseline characteristic derivation from VS and QS domains, BMI computation, age grouping, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 254 records.
